title: Modern Minecraft Textures Back-ported
description: Back-ports the modern Minecraft textures to 1.12
body:
## 📜 Brief Description
Back-ports almost every modern Minecraft textures to 1.12.

## ❌ Textures that are not modified at the moment
**Horse armor:** The models have for the armor was changed in later versions, and the textures won't line up anymore.

**New Water:** The textures for the water in 1.13 is a greyscaled version of the normal water and the color of the water is controlled by the game's code which was not there in 1.12.

**Some Particals:** The way the particals texture is formatted was later changed in the newer versions making it really hard to back-port that.

**Title Screen Panorama:** There are so many panoramas for each verison of Minecraft after 1.14 so I don't know which one to put.

**Java Edition Logo:** It's very low resolution texture in the older verions and I can't fit the new "Java editon" logo in it, I might fix that in later versions.

**Villagers:** Their professions and models got updated in 1.14, the same update where the new textures were introduced, so I had nothing to work off of.
